dataList.dlg: Confirming Work Initiation Sequences... complete. Initiating 38th Insight Work on Subject T-04-50.

Yes. I arrived 15 minutes prior to the designated business hour. I am currently instructing all Clerical personnel to steer clear of conducting businesses in this hallway, as the manager always commands me to perform Managerial Work on Subject T-04-50 immediately after the commencement of work hours. This precaution will improve our efficiency in the days to come.

It was a creative stroke of genius to take advantage of the Welfare Team Clerical staff's lunch time.
You only have so many Execution Bullets to spend, after all.

The Ordeal, which has been estimated to be today's greatest threat, has been managed without fatalities. Newly accommodated Abnormalities, too... can be managed without significant risk.
Understood. I will let the rest of the team know that tonight's overtime will continue otherwise indefinitely barring an event of Qliphoth Meltdown.

This Abnormality appears to have been realized as an amalgamation of an entire bee colony. Its Classification Code designation suggests that it has manifested from a trauma of some sort, but... hm. One must wonder, as objects it bears resemblance to were rather commonly observable.

It is presumed that the original form of this E.G.O weapon is a rifle. However, upon cross-disciplinary analysis of Abnormalities assigned to the Welfare Team and the frequency of cooperation requests from other Teams... it can be determined that using this gear on its own will be insufficient.
I have submitted a report detailing how certain transformations of the E.G.O weapon could result in a 162% efficiency boost—please review it at your leisure, Manager.

... It seems that you are uninterested in moving yourself, as you would much rather remain stationary in this containment unit and proliferate those who would work in your service. 
Hm... I have provided more efficiency-oriented insights as that seemed to be what you were after... ... To your satisfaction, as expected. I will make good use of this hat.

Dusk of Amber suppression complete. Mm... Recording observations. As presumed, the entities' digestive system does not conform to the typical rules of anatomy.
As per my firsthand observation, its intestines were reversed and in process of liquefaction; I identified a vulnerability in its interior walls, which was easily torn open using a scattershot fire, allowing for my escape.
Its flavor... Orange.

Alerting all Welfare Team personnel. Promptly escape the department hallways and rendezvous at Central Command. Qliphoth Counter management has failed, resulting in unmitigated propagation of spores—
Stop. Correction: All Agents, equip your combat gear and return. ... Worker Bee entities have hatched.

Mister Chesed discourages us from overtime and tells us to stay only for our designated hours and head home on time, but... As your will takes precedence, Manager, we will be clocking overtime hours tonight.
Perhaps you have identified a certain opportunity... That may indeed be the case since you have even disregarded Mister Chesed's advice today.

Ordeal "Food Chain" identified. Commencing suppression and the requested field experimentation. Agents mustn't take offensive maneuvers even should the Captain be swallowed by an Ordeal. That would be all.
I am always ready for deployment.
Mobilizing to the suppression zone.
My weapon was designed for the sole purpose of inflicting bodily harm. If you are in need of Sanity recuperation, please search for a different Agent.
All that's needed is the will to hit bullseye.
Suppression target is exhibiting signs of fatigue.
Agh... Requesting a shot of HP-N Bullet.
Target neutralized. Moving on to the next suppression target...

... I thought I would die by an Execution Bullet... or during Management... but...
What a rare experience to cap it off...
I have become an expert in Insight Work.
I am not a suitable candidate for this Work.

... Trumpet alarm deactivated. The Welfare Team has suffered... two fatalities, Manager. While it is true that this loss of human resources may be detrimental to our productivity, employment via Ad Hoc recruitment will fill the vacancies without issue.
It is fortunate that Abnormalities under the Welfare Team's care do not pose any significant risk—
There seems to be some trouble involving Agent Ryōshū. If you'll excuse me.

That was, save for a few negligible casualties, a near-flawless suppression effort. We will now resume the overtime you have ordered—
<color=#cf0000>Hey, A.U.'s broken containment. Heh. It's your turn to get a move on, Team Captain...</color>
... Manager. Next time, consider authorizing for Agent Ryōshū an assignment of weapons capable of bodily harm.

Our attempt to control the subject's spore propagation has failed, Manager. 17... No, 21 Worker Bee entities have been identified at the present. Subject T-04-50-2 suppression feasibility at 0.3% with the remaining personnel.
It has been an honor to be in your service, Manager.
